overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring the mythical city of Atlantis. The character ascends a stone pathway from a lower terrace to a high cliff summit, revealing a panoramic view of the ancient marble metropolis with its distinctive blue energy beams and reflecting pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone pathway between rock formations approaching marble tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the stone paved path toward the white marble tower with red dome

entered.detail: tall white marble structure with red circular dome and blue vertical stripes
large natural rock wall with green moss and vegetation
tall white rock cliff face with sparse vegetation
cobblestone walkway with rectangular stone slabs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone path flanked by rock formations, approaching a distinctive white marble tower with a red dome. The path is enclosed by natural rock walls on both sides, creating a narrow corridor leading toward the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside trail with emerging panoramic views

events.description: path opens up from enclosed stone corridor to rocky hillside with distant city view becoming visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the rocky dirt path uphill as the landscape opens to reveal distant blue energy pillars and the city below

entered.detail: tall glowing blue vertical beams of light in the distance
unpaved dirt and gravel path winding up the hillside
distant view of white marble buildings and structures in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed path to an open rocky hillside. The character ascends a dirt trail as the view expands to reveal the ancient city below with its distinctive blue energy pillars. The right rock formation moves closer while the tower disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff summit overlooking vast ancient metropolis with reflecting pools

events.description: character reaches cliff edge and pauses to overlook the panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing at the cliff edge surveying the vast Atlantis cityscape with its reflecting pools, marble structures, and vertical blue energy beams

entered.detail: expansive view of the ancient city with waterways, plazas, and marble architecture
massive glowing blue pillars of light extending from ground to sky
rectangular pools of blue water reflecting the surrounding architecture
white rocky outcrop at the edge of the cliff where character stands

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the summit and stands at the cliff edge, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of Atlantis. The city sprawls below with its distinctive blue energy beams, reflecting pools, and white marble architecture. The character pauses to observe the vast metropolis before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple cliff edge with ceremonial banner and stone statues

events.description: character turns left along cliff edge revealing blue ceremonial banner and stone lion statues

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the cliff edge examining the temple structures, blue banner, and stone statues

entered.detail: large blue fabric banner with golden trident symbol hanging from ornate golden posts
row of stone lion sculptures perched on the temple wall
ancient marble temple ruins with decorative columns and golden accents
burning fire bowls on stone pedestals near the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the cliff edge to the left, revealing a temple area with a prominent blue banner displaying a golden trident symbol. Stone lion statues line the temple walls, and lit braziers burn near the entrance, while the city remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a narrow rocky corridor into a sweeping panoramic vista of the mythical city of Atlantis. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone path enclosed by natural rock walls, moving steadily toward a white marble tower with a red dome. As the path opens onto a rocky hillside, the camera ascends a dirt trail and the view expands to reveal the distant city and its glowing blue energy pillars. The scene then reaches a climax at the cliff's summit, where the character pauses to observe the vast metropolis of reflecting pools and marble architecture sprawling below. Finally, the camera glides along the cliff edge to the left, shifting focus toward a temple adorned with stone lion statues and a blue banner featuring a golden trident.
